Test 1.2: ideate.md has no Task() calls for architecture
Test 1.3: artifact-generation.md has no auto Skill(devforgeai-architecture)
Test 1.4: ideate.md uses result-interpreter for display (not auto-invoke)
assertions: Skill invocation pattern NOT found in ideate.md
Task invocation pattern NOT found in ideate.md
Skill invocation pattern NOT found in artifact-generation.md

assertions: Step 6.6 or Phase 6.6 FOUND in completion-handoff.md

test_names: Test 4.1: completion-handoff.md uses AskUserQuestion for next action
Test 4.2: ideate.md has clean exit (Command Complete section)
Test 4.3: No automatic workflow chaining in ideate.md
Test 4.4: W3 compliance verified (no skill auto-chaining)
assertions: Forced workflow patterns (THEN invoke, THEN Skill) NOT found
Architecture skill auto-invocation NOT found in artifact-generation.md

findings.details: All 4 acceptance criteria covered by 16 comprehensive test checks. Each AC has exactly 4 tests covering different aspects of the requirement.
Tests use clear, descriptive names following pattern 'Test X.Y: description'. Each test has single assertion with clear pass/fail logic (grep pattern matching).
No skip decorators (0), no TODO placeholders (0), no empty test bodies (0). All tests have actual assertions with grep patterns or conditional logic.
Tests do not depend on execution order. No shared state between tests. Each test independently validates file presence/absence of patterns using grep.
Tests cover: quote variant handling in regex, null/empty checks (|| true pattern), greenfield-specific path validation, multi-line context with -A flag.
grep confirms /create-context recommendation present in completion-handoff.md. Architecture skill invocation completely removed from artifact-generation.md. No auto-chaining patterns in ideate.md.
Tests confirm no auto-invocation of devforgeai-architecture skill. Commands orchestrate principle verified. User control maintained via AskUserQuestion.

recommendations.suggestion: Consider adding integration test that simulates full /ideate command execution and verifies skill output is displayed without auto-invoking architecture skill. Current tests validate file presence/absence but not runtime behavior.
Consider adding negative test case for edge case #1 (skill fails to provide next action) - verify fallback message displays correctly when /create-context recommendation is missing.
Test README.md in tests/STORY-135/ directory is excellent. Consider adding example grep command outputs for visibility into what tests are validating.

conclusion: STORY-135 test coverage is comprehensive and well-designed. All 4 acceptance criteria are fully covered by 16 independent, non-gaming test checks that achieve 100% pass rate. Tests are maintainable, clear, and validate both positive cases (display output exists) and negative cases (auto-invocation is removed). W3 compliance is verified. Implementation files (ideate.md, artifact-generation.md, completion-handoff.md) have been correctly modified to support display-only architecture handoff with user control maintained.
suggested_next_steps: Proceed to QA phase for deep validation and integration testing
Verify end-to-end /ideate command execution with skill output display
Test brownfield vs greenfield mode recommendations work correctly
